calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:05am
Judge Pro Tem David M. Porter, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent Wei Xue appears in Pro Per; Appellant Safyanna A. Mateen appears in Pro Per. Parties were previously sworn. Chien Chen appears with the respondent Wei Xue, to help Ms. Xue with translating Mandarin into English, and English into Mandarine. Both parties present their respective cases in the narrative. Judge Porter has questions for the parties. Appellant, Sufyanna Mateen, makes an oral motion to continue the matter. After argument the motion and the case are submitted
9:40am
No new evidence is identified or admitted
